title: DNA Concentration Measurement
author: Alba Balletbó
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.79khr4w

steps.title: Open the ND-1000 V3
steps.instruction: Open the ND-1000 V3.8.1 Program using the computer (the computer should be connected to the Nanodrop apparatus).

steps.title: Click on the corresponding application module (e
steps.instruction: Click on the corresponding application module (e.g., Nucleic acid to determine the concentration and purity of nucleic acid).

steps.title: Open the sampling arm and load a blank sample (e
steps.instruction: Open the sampling arm and load a blank sample (e.g., TE Buffer, MQ Water, etc.). 1.5 µL

steps.title: Close the sampling arm on the...
steps.instruction: Close the sampling arm on the machine to cover the blank sample.

steps.title: Open the sampling arm and clean...
steps.instruction: Open the sampling arm and clean the blank off the upper and lower pedestals using a Kim Wipe.

steps.title: Load your DNA or RNA sample...
steps.instruction: Load your DNA or RNA sample and close the sampling arm. 1.5 µL

steps.title: Select the sample type in the program (e
steps.instruction: Select the sample type in the program (e.g., DNA or RNA).

steps.title: When finalized, read the 260/280, 260/230 and concentration (ng/µL) measurements
steps.instruction: When finalized, read the 260/280, 260/230 and concentration (ng/µL) measurements.

steps.title: Clean the nucleic acid sample off...
steps.instruction: Clean the nucleic acid sample off of the upper and lower pedestals using a Kim Wipe.
